name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
notes: GitHub OIDC client id for UI release and deploy workflows.

name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
notes: Azure tenant id discovered from az account show when available.

name: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
notes: Azure subscription id discovered from az account show when available.

name: RESOURCE_GROUP
notes: Shared runtime resource group owned by control-plane provisioning.

name: ACR_NAME
notes: Shared Azure Container Registry name.

name: ACR_PULL_IDENTITY_NAME
notes: User-assigned identity used by the UI Container App to pull from ACR.

name: CONTAINER_APPS_ENVIRONMENT_NAME
notes: Shared Container Apps environment name.

name: SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Shared workload identity or service account name.

name: UI_APP_NAME
notes: Standalone UI Container App name.

name: UI_PUBLIC_HOSTNAME
notes: Stable public UI hostname bound directly to the external UI Container App with an ACA-managed certificate after DNS validation succeeds.

name: CONTRACTS_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling contracts repo slug used by workflows.

name: CONTRACTS_REF
notes: Contracts ref to validate against by default.

name: API_UPSTREAM
notes: Reachable control-plane host used by the UI proxy for /api plus root-scoped /healthz and /readyz. Store host or host:port only.

name: API_UPSTREAM_SCHEME
notes: Scheme used by the UI proxy when connecting to API_UPSTREAM. Normal production routing should use the control-plane internal route rather than the public API origin.

name: UI_AUTH_ENABLED
notes: Boolean runtime toggle for browser authentication and login in the UI container.

name: UI_AUTH_PROVIDER
notes: Browser auth mode advertised by the UI runtime. Standard deployed environments use oidc; password is not part of the normal UI deploy path.

name: UI_ALLOWED_INGRESS_CIDRS
notes: Comma- or newline-delimited trusted source CIDRs allowed to reach the public UI Container App ingress.

name: UI_OIDC_AUTHORITY
notes: OIDC authority published by the UI-owned /ui-config.js bootstrap only when UI_AUTH_PROVIDER=oidc.

name: UI_OIDC_CLIENT_ID
notes: OIDC client id published by the UI-owned /ui-config.js bootstrap only when UI_AUTH_PROVIDER=oidc.

name: UI_OIDC_SCOPES
notes: Space- or comma-delimited OIDC scopes published by the UI-owned /ui-config.js bootstrap only when UI_AUTH_PROVIDER=oidc.

name: UI_OIDC_AUDIENCE
notes: Optional OIDC audience or audiences published by the UI-owned /ui-config.js bootstrap only when UI_AUTH_PROVIDER=oidc.

name: NPMRC
notes: Complete .npmrc content with read access to @asset-allocation/contracts. Store multiline content in .env.web as escaped \n and sync it as the GitHub secret NPMRC.
